page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. For hardware acceleration, it includes a single NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM. Local storage is not bundled with this instance, requiring external block storage solutions, and the baseline network bandwidth is rated at 2 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance exhibits modest CPU and memory performance. The stress-ng single-core CPU performance score of 953.38 falls within the bottom 10%, while the multi-core CPU score of 4755.08 is situated in the bottom 25%. Memory bandwidth tests show 37.18 GB/sec for large block read-only operations and 25.34 GB/sec for large block write operations, both of which are categorized in the bottom 25%. Similarly, database operations and Redis SET performance of 5.48 million operations per second reflect entry-level capabilities for its hardware class.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge offers a budget-friendly entry point into GPU-accelerated computing. While its legacy Intel Xeon CPU and Pascal-generation GPU limit its suitability for demanding modern deep learning training, the hardware profile is well-suited for lighter GPU workloads. Appropriate use cases include legacy CUDA-based applications, video transcoding, basic machine learning inference, and remote graphics rendering where high-end compute density is not required.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz, 32.0 GB of RAM, and a single NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this x86_64 instance does not include local storage and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Benchmark results place its CPU and memory performance in the lower tiers, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 4755.08 and a Redis SET throughput of 5.48 million operations per second. Consequently, this instance represents a cost-effective option for entry-level GPU workloads rather than high-performance computing. It is best suited for workloads such as basic machine learning inference, legacy CUDA applications, video transcoding, and lightweight graphics rendering.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU with 8 GB VRAM, designed for entry-level parallel processing workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge features 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU for entry-level GPU-accelerated workloads.
tagline: An entry-level GPU-accelerated instance combining dedicated Intel Xeon processors with an NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU for lightweight parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 vCPUs and 32 GB of system memory
Equipped with one NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU featuring 8 GB of VRAM
KVM-based x86_64 architecture with 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
No local storage included, requiring external block storage volumes
Best suited for lightweight GPU inference, video transcoding, and legacy CUDA tasks
